name: Ebsta Revenue Intelligence API
what_it_does: Relationship intelligence and revenue platform with REST API — capturing all email and calendar activity from Gmail and Outlook to Salesforce automatically, scoring relationship strength with contacts and accounts, providing pipeline health analytics, and surfacing at-risk deals based on engagement signals.
use_cases: Querying relationship strength scores for accounts to prioritize outreach
Pulling pipeline health analytics and deal risk signals for revenue reviews
Integrating automatic email/calendar activity capture with Salesforce CRM
Monitoring contact engagement frequency to identify stalling deals
Automating CRM data hygiene by surfacing missing contacts and activities
not_for: Cold email outreach and sequencing (use Salesloft or Outreach)
AI sales forecasting without Salesforce (Ebsta requires Salesforce)
best_when: A Salesforce-based sales team wants automatic email/calendar capture to CRM with relationship strength scoring, eliminating manual data entry and providing deal health signals from actual communication patterns.
avoid_when: You don't use Salesforce, need outbound sales sequencing, or want AI forecasting independent of CRM relationship data.

auth.notes: API key from Ebsta account settings. Bearer token auth. Salesforce org-scoped access. No webhooks. Salesforce OAuth required for CRM access. Gmail and Outlook OAuth for email capture. Multiple OAuth layers required for full integration.

pricing.notes: UK-based company (London). Founded 2013. Salesforce AppExchange partner. Relationship intelligence differentiator — scores relationship health based on email/calendar frequency and recency. Automatic activity capture eliminates manual CRM data entry. Pipeline review with engagement analytics. Strong in enterprise SaaS sales teams.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for relationship scores, pipeline analytics, and activity data. Bearer token auth. Limited public documentation. Salesforce org required. Gmail and Outlook OAuth required for email capture. Pipeline analytics based on activity engagement patterns.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Relationship score reads fully idempotent. Pipeline reads idempotent. Activity reads idempotent by time period.
known_agent_gotchas: Salesforce required — no CRM agnostic option
Gmail and Outlook OAuth required for email capture — multi-layer auth complexity
Relationship scores based on historical activity — new installs need ramp-up period
Annual contract typical — evaluate ROI before API integration investment
Limited public API documentation — engage Ebsta support for integration guidance

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 and GDPR compliant. US and EU data residency. Bearer token auth. Email content access is highly sensitive — implement strict OAuth scope minimization. Salesforce and email OAuth tokens require secure storage. UK-based company with GDPR native compliance.
